name: Video games as stimuli in neuroimaging studies: a minireview
subtitle: Blank et al., 2026

salience-insula.label: Anterior Insula / Salience
salience-insula.source: Anterior insula (AI) responses to unfair offers (Sanfey et al., 2003), unreciprocated cooperation (Rilling et al., 2008), and context-appropriate behavior (King et al., 2006) as discussed in Blank et al. (2026)

acc-medial-frontal.label: Anterior Cingulate / Medial Prefrontal
acc-medial-frontal.source: Rostral ACC activity during cooperation (Rilling et al., 2002); dorsal ACC and medial prefrontal activity during violent scenes and wins/losses as reviewed in Blank et al. (2026)

default-mode.label: Default Mode Network
default-mode.source: DMN activation during overly easy (boring) tasks; precuneus activity during violent scenes; posterior cingulate and theory-of-mind network for predicting attack intents, as reviewed in Blank et al. (2026)

central-executive.label: Cognitive Control / CEN
central-executive.source: DLPFC activity during flow state (balanced task difficulty) and superior/inferior parietal activity during competition and flow, as reviewed in Blank et al. (2026)

tpj-tom.label: Theory of Mind Network / TPJ
tpj-tom.source: Temporoparietal junction activation during violent scenes and theory-of-mind network identified for predicting attack intents of others (Ye et al., 2025; Mathiak & Weber, 2006) as reviewed in Blank et al. (2026)

frontal-parietal-board.label: Dorsal Frontal & Posterior Parietal (Strategic Thinking)
frontal-parietal-board.source: Dorsal prefrontal and parietal activity during GO/chess board game viewing and navigation-based thought studies, as reviewed in Blank et al. (2026)
